'''havuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psechrid|psechrid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psechrid|psechrid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| havuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæviwith|hæviwith]] || [[word:hæviwij|hæviwij]] || [[word:hæviwish|hæviwish]] || [[word:hæviwi|hæviwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:havuvuwuth|havuvuwuth]] || [[word:havuvuwuj|havuvuwuj]] || [[word:havuvuwush|havuvuwush]] || [[word:havuvuwu|havuvuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:havuwuth|havuwuth]] || [[word:havuwuj|havuwuj]] || [[word:havuwush|havuwush]] || [[word:havuwu|havuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:havufwuth|havufwuth]] || [[word:havufwuj|havufwuj]] || [[word:havufwush|havufwush]] || [[word:havufwuf|havufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havuwuthu|havuwuthu]] || [[word:havuwuju|havuwuju]] || [[word:havuwushu|havuwushu]] || [[word:havuwuku|havuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havuwuth|havuwuth]] || [[word:havuwuj|havuwuj]] || [[word:havuwush|havuwush]] || [[word:havuwu|havuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havuwuthul|havuwuthul]] || [[word:havuwujul|havuwujul]] || [[word:havuwushul|havuwushul]] || [[word:havuwukul|havuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havuwuthuthu|havuwuthuthu]] || [[word:havuwujuju|havuwujuju]] || [[word:havuwushushu|havuwushushu]] || [[word:havuwuku|havuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havuwuthun|havuwuthun]] || [[word:havuwujun|havuwujun]] || [[word:havuwushun|havuwushun]] || [[word:havuwukun|havuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havuwuthuoro|havuwuthuoro]] || [[word:havuwujuoro|havuwujuoro]] || [[word:havuwushuoro|havuwushuoro]] || [[word:havuwukuoro|havuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
